UI_GameNightWindow: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> Game Window <LINE> <LINE> <SIZE:small> <LEFT> <SIZE:small> MOVING PIECES <LINE> Left-click and drag to move a piece. Release to place it. <LINE> Mouse wheel while holding a piece rotates it. <LINE> <LINE> SELECTING MULTIPLE PIECES <LINE> Alt+Click a piece to add or remove it from your selection. <LINE> Drag on an empty area to draw a selection rectangle. <LINE> Left-click a selected piece to drag the whole group together. <LINE> Shaking a group quickly in a small area clusters the pieces. <LINE> <LINE> CARDS & DECKS <LINE> Shaking a single card rapidly in a small area will shuffle it if it is a deck, or merge it with a nearby deck. <LINE> Shaking a group of cards merges them into one pile. <LINE> <LINE> DICE & PHYSICS <LINE> Shift+Drag a die then release to throw it — force scales with drag speed and distance. <LINE> Dice and game pieces have physics and collision. <LINE> <LINE> RIGHT-CLICK MENU <LINE> Right-clicking a piece opens a context menu showing all available actions. <LINE> <LINE> SIDEBAR <LINE> The sidebar shows your inventory and nearby box contents. <LINE> Alt+Click items to select them. Shift+Click to range-select within a section. <LINE> Left-click a selected item to drag the whole group onto the board. <LINE> <LINE> OTHER <LINE> A timer icon over a piece means it is on cooldown from a recent action. <LINE> The + button at the bottom left resizes the window. <LINE> <LINE> Enjoy game night! <LINE> <LINE>
UI_GameNightSearch: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> Deck Search Window <LINE> <LINE> <SIZE:small> <LEFT> REORDERING CARDS <LINE> Drag a card onto another card to swap their positions. <LINE> Drag a card to the thin line between two cards to insert it there. <LINE> Drag a card out to the game window to place it on the board. <LINE> <LINE> MULTI-SELECT <LINE> Alt+Click a card to add or remove it from your selection. Selected cards are highlighted. <LINE> Shift+Click to range-select from the last selected card to the clicked card. <LINE> Alt+Shift+Click extends the range from your last anchor point. <LINE> Clicking an empty area or an unselected card clears the selection. <LINE> Scrolling preserves your selection so you can pick cards across the whole deck. <LINE> <LINE> ACTING ON A SELECTION <LINE> Left-click any selected card and drag to move the entire selection to the game window or another open deck. <LINE> Right-click any selected card to open a batch action menu: Draw or Flip all selected cards at once. <LINE> <LINE> SINGLE CARD ACTIONS <LINE> Right-click a card for individual Draw and Flip options. <LINE> <LINE> Enjoy game night! <LINE> <LINE>
